title: When Making Decisions with Probabilities: - Stick to the Best Choice: Pick the Option
subtitle: Focus on Best Odds
description:
When making decisions with probabilities:
- Stick to the best choice: Pick the option with the highest likelihood of success, even if it feels repetitive.
- Avoid overthinking: Don’t try to "balance" probabilities—maximize them instead.
- Track outcomes: Note what works best over time to reinforce smarter decisions.

Example: Choosing between two investments? Opt for the one with higher consistent returns, even if less exciting.

faq.answer: Use the check-in method described above and track it in the Life OS app for consistent progress monitoring.

faq.question: What if I miss a day or forget to do this habit?
faq.answer: Don't worry! Life OS habits are designed to be flexible. Just get back on track the next day without judgment.

faq.question: How long does it take to form this habit?
faq.answer: Research shows habits can take 21-66 days to form. Focus on consistency rather than perfection, and use the app to build momentum.

howTo.title: Define the metric baseline
howTo.summary: Identify the decisions you make regularly and estimate their probabilities of success. Use a simple scale to categorize these probabilities and establish a baseline for tracking.

howTo.title: Choose the highest probability option
howTo.summary: When faced with a decision, select the option with the highest estimated probability of success. Log your choice and the reasoning behind it to reinforce the habit.

howTo.title: Track outcomes and adjust estimates
howTo.summary: Regularly review the outcomes of your decisions. Compare observed success rates to your initial estimates and adjust your probability assessments accordingly.

howTo.title: Schedule exploratory choices
howTo.summary: Allocate a small percentage of your decisions for exploratory options. This helps maintain curiosity while still prioritizing high-probability choices.

howTo.title: Check in with LifeOS Brali app
howTo.summary: Log your decisions, outcomes, and reflections in the Brali LifeOS app to track progress and reinforce the habit. Access it at https://metalhatscats.com/life-os/best-odds-decision-making/.
